chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P N.D- 609 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge For non-prosecution 12.09.2023 Since filing of this petition on 27.03.2023, none has appeared to pursue the same. Today, no one is present. The petition is dismissed for non-prosectuion. Judge Judge ARBROHI Judge Judge ARBROHI
